title: Family Setup in Under 3 Minutes
summary: Create your family, add members, and pair devices with a PIN. No accounts, no passwords, no cloud.

title: Day View — Your Family's Timeline
summary: A clean, vertical timeline grouped by category with completion tracking. The heart of Nesta.

title: The Satisfying Completion Toggle
summary: Per-member task completion with a delightful micro-animation, synced to every device instantly.

title: Quick Add — 3 Taps to Schedule
summary: Add items to the calendar faster than writing a sticky note. Title, time, done.

title: Smart Recurrence
summary: Visual recurrence picker with live preview of the next 5 occurrences. No more guessing.

title: Week at a Glance
summary: Seven-day strip with completion dots and tap-to-view navigation for planning ahead.

title: Month Overview
summary: Traditional month grid with dot indicators for busy days. The long lens for your family.

title: Family Management
summary: Add, remove, and manage family members and paired devices as life evolves.

title: Night Mode — Calm in the Dark
summary: True black display with a warm clock — designed for OLED screens at night.

title: Seamless Local Sync
summary: Automatic device discovery and sub-second sync over your home WiFi. Zero cloud dependency.

title: Gentle Notifications
summary: Configurable reminders, daily summaries, and quiet hours. Helpful, never intrusive.

title: Display Mode — Dedicated Family Display
summary: Turn any device into a child-safe family command centre mounted on the kitchen wall.
